mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job (company_id, title, company_name, source_site, job_key, job_status, city, experience, education, min_salary, max_salary, salary_unit, skills, job_desc, url, publish_time, last_seen_at, created_at) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{title}, #{companyName}, #{sourceSite}, #{jobKey}, #{jobStatus}, #{city}, #{experience}, #{education}, #{minSalary}, #{maxSalary}, #{salaryUnit}, #{skills}, #{jobDesc}, #{url}, #{publishTime}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT city AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE' GROUP BY city ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT company_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE' GROUP BY company_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT skill AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG(salary) AS avgSalary FROM ( SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(j.skills, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)) AS skill, (j.min_salary + j.max_salary) / 2 AS salary FROM job j JOIN (SELECT 1 n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5) numbers ON CHAR_LENGTH(j.skills) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(j.skills, ',', '')) >= numbers.n - 1 WHERE j.job_status != 'OFFLINE' ) t WHERE skill != '' GROUP BY skill ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN (min_salary + max_salary) / 2 < 8000 THEN '8k以下' WHEN (min_salary + max_salary) / 2 < 15000 THEN '8k-15k' WHEN (min_salary + max_salary) / 2 < 25000 THEN '15k-25k' ELSE '25k以上' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE' GROUP BY name ORDER BY avgSalary
SELECT education AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE' GROUP BY education ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT experience AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE' GROUP BY experience ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT job_status AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job GROUP BY job_status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT title AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE' AND title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' GROUP BY title ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN publish_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS last7_days, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND publish_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prev7_days FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE'

SELECT * FROM job ORDER BY publish_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM job WHERE job_key = #{jobKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE job SET job_status = 'OFFLINE' WHERE source_site = #{sourceSite} AND job_status != 'OFFLINE'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job WHERE job_status != 'OFFLINE' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY created_at DESC
